title: T4008 Payroll Deductions Supplementary Tables - Canada.ca
content:
## T4008 Payroll Deductions Supplementary Tables
Use T4008, Payroll Deductions Supplementary Tables to calculate the Federal, Provincial and Territorial Income Tax Deductions, the Employment Insurance premiums, and the Canada Pension Plan contributions.
- T4008 - Previous-year tables

## Payroll Deductions Online Calculator
Use the Payroll Deductions Online Calculator (PDOC) to quickly calculate federal and provincial payroll deductions.
To get quick and easy access to new payroll deductions tables and other recently announced tax information, you can subscribe, free of charge , to one or more of these electronic mailing lists .

## Business Information
If you can't find an answer to a question about your payroll requirements or need assistance using the calculator, visit Contact the CRA .
- Payroll Deductions Online Calculator (PDOC)

### Give feedback about this page
